Container.Name: Moolah
Container.Overview: Self-hosted personal-finance, budgeting and net-worth tracker. Requires an external PostgreSQL database — set DATABASE_URL to point at it. Generate AUTH_SECRET with: openssl rand -base64 33

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Host port to reach the app on. http://<unraid-ip>:<this>

Config.Name: DATABASE_URL
Config.Description: Postgres connection string. On the default bridge use the Unraid host IP + published Postgres port, e.g. postgresql://moolah:moolah@192.168.1.10:5432/moolah

Config.Name: AUTH_SECRET
Config.Description: Session signing secret. Generate with: openssl rand -base64 33

Config.Name: AUTH_BYPASS
Config.Description: true skips the login screen, but only works over localhost — leave false for a LAN-reachable container and use a password.

Config.Name: AUTH_URL
Config.Description: Public URL the app is reached at, e.g. http://192.168.1.10:5555 — pins post-login redirects so they don't bounce to the container hostname.

Config.Name: AUTH_TRUST_HOST
Config.Description: Required when running behind Unraid's bridge networking.

Config.Name: DEMO_MODE
Config.Description: Public demo mode — leave false for normal use.

Config.Name: PLAID_CLIENT_ID
Config.Description: Optional Plaid client ID for bank sync. Leave blank if unused.

Config.Name: PLAID_SECRET
Config.Description: Optional Plaid secret for bank sync. Leave blank if unused.

Config.Name: PLAID_ENV
Config.Description: Plaid environment: sandbox, development, or production.

Config.Name: Backups
Config.Description: Host folder where scheduled local backups are written. Maps to /backups inside the container so backups survive container rebuilds. Each backup is a full JSON dump including your Plaid tokens — keep this folder private.

Config.Name: BACKUP_LOCAL_DIR
Config.Description: Where scheduled backups land inside the container for the local destination. Leave as /backups to match the Backups host-path mapping above. Ignored for the Google Drive destination.
